  1. Home

Privacy Policy

Your privacy matters to us. Learn how CodeNova Technologies collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information while providing secure digital solutions and services.

Privacy Policy

Your Privacy Is Our Priority

At CodeNova Technologies, we are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and safeguard your data whenever you visit our website or use our software development, cloud, AI, and digital services.

Information We Collect

We collect only the information necessary to provide better services, improve user experience, process project inquiries, respond to customer requests, and maintain secure communication with our clients.

Personal Information
Website Usage Data
Cookies & Analytics
Secure Data Handling

100%

Secure Data Protection

SSL

Encrypted Connection

GDPR

Compliance Ready

24/7

Security Monitoring

Zero

Data Misuse Policy
Learn More
Information Collection

What Information We Collect

We collect only the information necessary to deliver quality services, improve your experience, ensure website security, and communicate effectively with our clients.

Personal Information

We may collect your name, email address, phone number, company details, billing information, and other information that you voluntarily submit through our contact forms, quotations, and service requests.

Usage Information

Our systems automatically collect browser type, operating system, device information, IP address, visited pages, session duration, referral sources, and website performance statistics to improve user experience.

Cookies & Tracking Technologies

Cookies help us remember your preferences, analyze website traffic, personalize content, enhance security, and improve website functionality through trusted analytics tools.

Third-Party Services

We may use trusted third-party providers such as Google Analytics, payment gateways, cloud hosting, communication services, and email platforms that process information securely according to their own privacy policies.

Data Privacy

How We Use & Protect Your Information

We process your information responsibly to provide high-quality services, improve website performance, maintain security, and comply with legal obligations while respecting your privacy.

How We Use Your Information

  • Deliver requested services
  • Respond to inquiries and support requests
  • Process quotations and project proposals
  • Improve website performance and usability
  • Send important service updates

Data Protection

We implement industry-standard security measures including SSL encryption, secure servers, firewalls, restricted access, regular security monitoring, and secure backups to protect your personal information from unauthorized access or misuse.

User Rights

You have the right to access, update, correct, download, or request deletion of your personal information. You may also withdraw consent for marketing communications at any time.

Data Retention

Personal information is retained only for as long as necessary to fulfill business purposes, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, maintain security records, and improve our services before being securely deleted.

Security & Compliance

Security Measures & Privacy Commitment

We continuously improve our security standards to protect your information, maintain transparency, and ensure our privacy practices remain up to date with applicable laws and industry standards.

Security Measures

We use SSL encryption, secure cloud infrastructure, firewalls, access controls, regular backups, vulnerability monitoring, and security audits to safeguard your information.

Children's Privacy

Our services are not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. If such information is identified, it will be removed promptly.

Policy Updates

We may revise this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect improvements, legal requirements, and service updates. Any changes will be published on this page with the latest revision date.

Contact Privacy Team

Questions About Your Privacy?

If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, your personal information, or your privacy rights, our Privacy Team is always available to assist you.

Privacy Support

Need Help With Your Privacy Request?

Whether you want to access, update, correct, or delete your personal information, or simply have questions about how your data is processed, our Privacy Team is ready to help.

Contact Privacy Team Email Us
